sqlReaderQuery.value: @concat('select * from ',  item().tableSchemaName, '.', item().tableName, ' WHERE ', item().WaterMark_Column, ' >= ''', formatDateTime(adddays(utcnow(), -165), 'yyyy-MM-dd'), '''')

preCopyScript.value: @{concat('delete  from ', item().tableSchemaName, '.', item().tableName, ' WHERE ', item().WaterMark_Column, ' >= ''', formatDateTime(adddays(utcnow(), -165), 'yyyy-MM-dd'), '''')}

source.sqlReaderQuery: select * from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.tables where TABLE_TYPE ='base table'
